epics.description: Set up development environment and verify build pipeline for the AdanBrowser Chrome extension.

stories.summary: Install npm dependencies and verify clean install
stories.description:
Install npm dependencies (`npm install`) and verify clean install

*Required packages:* `@types/chrome`, `vite`, `typescript`, `eslint`, `prettier` ŌĆö all declared in `package.json`

stories.summary: Verify npm run build produces valid dist folder
stories.description:
Verify `npm run build` produces a valid `dist/` folder

*Acceptance Criteria:*
- All four Vite entry points must bundle without error: popup, options, background, content

stories.summary: Load unpacked extension in Chrome without manifest errors
stories.description:
Load unpacked extension in Chrome and confirm it appears without manifest errors

*Steps:*
1. Open `chrome://extensions`
2. Enable Dev mode
3. Load `dist/`
4. Verify no errors appear

stories.summary: Verify type-check passes with zero errors
stories.description:
Verify `npm run type-check` passes with zero errors

*Dependencies:* Requires E1-1 first (needs `@types/chrome` in `node_modules`)

stories.summary: Add adhan.mp3 audio asset to extension/public/
stories.description:
Add `adhan.mp3` audio asset to `extension/public/`

*Required by:* `AdhanPlayer.ts` and declared in `manifest.json` ŌåÆ `web_accessible_resources`

epics.description: Implement the core YouTube video interruption flow for prayer time notifications.

stories.summary: Implement YouTubePlayerController - detect, pause, resume player
stories.description:
Implement `YouTubePlayerController` ŌĆö detect, pause, resume `#movie_player video`

*File:* `content/youtube/YouTubePlayerController.ts`
*Note:* Selector must target primary player only, not ads/previews

stories.summary: Implement AdhanOverlay with i18n support
stories.description:
Implement `AdhanOverlay` ŌĆö inject styled overlay with i18n message, guard against duplicate instances

*File:* `content/youtube/AdhanOverlay.ts`
*Note:* Styles are inline stubs ŌĆö needs real design pass

stories.summary: Implement AdhanPlayer for audio playback
stories.description:
Implement `AdhanPlayer` ŌĆö play `adhan.mp3` via `chrome.runtime.getURL`, fire `onEnded` callback

*File:* `content/youtube/AdhanPlayer.ts`
*Dependencies:* Requires E1-5 (audio asset)

stories.summary: Wire content script interruption flow
stories.description:
Wire content script interruption flow ŌĆö `ADHAN_TRIGGER` ŌåÆ pause ŌåÆ overlay ŌåÆ play ŌåÆ resume ŌåÆ `ADHAN_COMPLETE`

*File:* `content/index.ts`
*Dependencies:* E2-1, E2-2, E2-3

stories.summary: Implement scheduleAdhan use case with real prayer times
stories.description:
Implement `scheduleAdhan` use case ŌĆö replace 10-second dev stub with real prayer time scheduling

*Current State:* Hardcoded 10s stub in `application/prayer/scheduleAdhan.ts`
*Blocker:* Waiting for prayer time data shape decision (see Epic 4)

stories.summary: Implement triggerAdhan use case
stories.description:
Implement `triggerAdhan` use case ŌĆö query YouTube tabs and dispatch `ADHAN_TRIGGER`

*File:* `application/prayer/triggerAdhan.ts`
*Status:* Logic is complete; needs integration test

stories.summary: Wire background service worker
stories.description:
Wire background service worker ŌĆö `onAlarm` ŌåÆ `triggerAdhan`, `onInstalled`/`onStartup` ŌåÆ `scheduleAdhan`

*File:* `background/index.ts`
*Dependencies:* E2-5, E2-6

epics.description: Validate and test all infrastructure adapters for Chrome APIs.

stories.summary: Validate alarmAdapter
stories.description:
Validate `alarmAdapter` ŌĆö create alarm, verify it fires, verify `onAlarm` listener is called

*File:* `infrastructure/alarms/alarmAdapter.ts`
*Test:* Needs manual smoke test or unit test

stories.summary: Validate messagingAdapter
stories.description:
Validate `messagingAdapter` ŌĆö `sendToYouTubeTabs` queries correct tabs and delivers message

*File:* `infrastructure/messaging/messagingAdapter.ts`
*Test:* Verify with a real open YouTube tab

stories.summary: Validate storageAdapter
stories.description:
Validate `storageAdapter` ŌĆö get/set roundtrip on `chrome.storage.local`

*File:* `infrastructure/storage/storageAdapter.ts`
*Note:* Not yet used ŌĆö will be needed for Epic 4

epics.description: Implement real prayer time scheduling with persistence.

stories.summary: Define PrayerTime data source for MVP
stories.description:
Define `PrayerTime` data source for MVP ŌĆö hardcoded daily times or user-configurable input

*File:* `domain/prayer/PrayerTime.ts`
*Decision Needed:* Static list vs. user settings

stories.summary: Implement real scheduleAdhan use case
stories.description:
Implement real `scheduleAdhan` use case ŌĆö compute next prayer from current time and register alarm

*Replaces:* The 10s dev stub
*Dependencies:* E4-1

stories.summary: Persist prayer schedule to chrome.storage.local
stories.description:
Persist prayer schedule to `chrome.storage.local` via `storageAdapter`

*Purpose:* Schedule survives service worker restarts
*Dependencies:* E4-2, E3-3

stories.summary: Re-schedule after each completed Adhan cycle
stories.description:
Re-schedule after each completed Adhan cycle ŌĆö `ADHAN_COMPLETE` triggers next `scheduleAdhan`

*File:* Wire in `background/index.ts`
*Dependencies:* E4-2

epics.description: Implement and verify English and Arabic localizations with RTL support.

stories.summary: Verify en locale renders correctly in overlay
stories.description:
Verify `en` locale renders correctly in overlay

*File:* `_locales/en/messages.json`
*Test:* Set Chrome language to English

stories.summary: Verify ar locale renders correctly with RTL
stories.description:
Verify `ar` locale renders correctly in overlay (RTL text direction)

*File:* `_locales/ar/messages.json`
*Note:* Overlay may need `dir="rtl"` style for Arabic

stories.summary: Add prayer name translations to locale files
stories.description:
Add prayer name translations to locale files for both `en` and `ar`

*Current:* Prayer name is passed raw (e.g. `"fajr"`)
*Required:* Should be capitalised/translated in the overlay message

epics.description: Polish the overlay user experience with proper design and interaction handling.

stories.summary: Design and implement overlay visuals
stories.description:
Design and implement overlay visuals ŌĆö background, typography, icon

*Current:* Inline stubs in `AdhanOverlay.ts`
*Guideline:* Keep it respectful and non-aggressive per `MVP_YOUTUBE_ADHAN.md`

stories.summary: Ensure overlay handles YouTube SPA navigation
stories.description:
Ensure overlay does not break YouTube navigation (SPA route changes)

*Issue:* YouTube is a SPA ŌĆö if user navigates away mid-Adhan the overlay must auto-clean

stories.summary: Prevent duplicate overlays from concurrent triggers
stories.description:
Ensure overlay does not appear if a second `ADHAN_TRIGGER` arrives while one is already active

*Current:* Guard exists in `AdhanOverlay.ts` (ID check)
*Required:* Explicit test

stories.summary: Add skip/dismiss button to overlay (CRITICAL UX)
stories.description:
**Add skip/dismiss button to overlay** ŌĆö allow users to exit Adhan early and resume video

*CRITICAL UX Feature*

*Requirements:*
- Add close button (├Ś) + Escape key handler
- When dismissed: stop audio, hide overlay, resume video
- Send ADHAN_COMPLETE with `skipped: true` flag

*Reference:* See `docs/E6-4_SKIP_DISMISS_IMPLEMENTATION.md`

epics.description: Set up testing infrastructure and comprehensive test coverage.

stories.summary: Configure Vitest as test runner
stories.description:
Configure Vitest as the test runner ŌĆö add to `package.json`, create `vitest.config.ts`

*Current:* `scripts/test` is a placeholder stub

stories.summary: Unit test YouTubePlayerController
stories.description:
Unit test `YouTubePlayerController` ŌĆö mock `document.querySelector`, verify pause/resume/isPlaying

*Dependencies:* E7-1, E2-1

stories.summary: Unit test AdhanOverlay
stories.description:
Unit test `AdhanOverlay` ŌĆö verify inject/remove/guard behaviour with JSDOM

*Dependencies:* E7-1, E2-2

stories.summary: Unit test scheduleAdhan use case
stories.description:
Unit test `scheduleAdhan` use case ŌĆö mock `alarmAdapter`, verify correct alarm time

*Dependencies:* E7-1, E4-2

stories.summary: Unit test triggerAdhan use case
stories.description:
Unit test `triggerAdhan` use case ŌĆö mock `messagingAdapter`, verify message is sent to tabs

*Dependencies:* E7-1, E2-6

stories.summary: End-to-end smoke test
stories.description:
End-to-end smoke test ŌĆö load extension in Chrome, trigger alarm manually, verify full flow

*Manual Test Checklist:*
- Ō£ō Video pauses
- Ō£ō Overlay appears
- Ō£ō Audio plays
- Ō£ō Overlay removed
- Ō£ō Video resumes

epics.description: Implement user-facing UI for popup and options pages.

stories.summary: Design popup UI with next prayer and test trigger
stories.description:
Design popup UI ŌĆö show next prayer name and time, manual "test Adhan" trigger button

*File:* `popup/popup.ts` (currently placeholder)
*Note:* Outside core MVP flow but useful for testing

stories.summary: Implement options page for prayer time configuration
stories.description:
Implement options page ŌĆö allow user to configure prayer times manually

*File:* `options/options.ts` (currently placeholder)
*Dependencies:* E4-1 decision about data source

metadata.description: Chrome browser extension for prayer time notifications on YouTube
